lines: Corin holds the blue ball against his chest with both arms.
"I am not letting Eda kick it inside again. Outside only. If outside comes back."
Corin sees the blue in your pack before you speak.
"You found it. That is mine. It is still mine, right?"

questUpdate.log: Quest complete: Corin has his blue ball again.

effects.log: Hanne gives you a clean field dressing for bringing the ball back.

lines: Corin points down the central hall, then pulls his hand back fast.
"It went past the old shelves. Selka said nobody little goes there. She said nobody big should either."
Corin is small enough to vanish behind Selka, but he steps out when he sees you looking at the lower hall.
"Eda kicked my blue ball. She said she could make it hit the wall and come back. It did not come back."
"It went down there. We are not allowed deeper. You are allowed, maybe."

questUpdate.log: Quest updated: find Corin's blue ball deeper in the catacombs.
